prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: STATIC-CORROSION-ZIPBAG-PARENT-CF Product Type: UTILITY_HOLSTER_POUCH Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical Existing Title: ASR Tactical 10pk Multipurpose Anti Static Electronics Survival Prepper Reusable Storage Bags Sleeve (Multiple Sizes) Description: The anti static storage, travel and transfer bags by ASR Tactical are a multipurpose tool to keep with your bug out bag, survival kit, emergency supplies, technology or electronics office, lab and more; Traditionally used for storing electronic components, these reusable bags can be used to protect any ferrous and non-ferrous items from corrosion and moisture.

How does it work? Static electricity can stay in one place and build up over time. These reusable storage bags made from durable polyethylene have special additives that give them a dissipative property, preventing the build-up static electricity. This property makes them especially ideal for the storage or movement of electronic components like a hard drive, memory card, smaller development boards and more.

In addition to electronics, you can also use these bags for lots of other purposes. One example is gun storage: if you're planning to store any small guns like pistols or handguns, these anti static reusable bags are a fantastic option to keep your gun protected from the outside environment and in excellent working condition; the resealable bags will ensure any moisture, damage or corrosion is bypassed for years to come.

The anti static storage bags can also lend a hand in the event of a natural disaster, earthquake, emergency, survival or prepping; use them to storing and protect cell phones, keys, passports, important documents, photos or other metal-constructed items that need to stay safe and dry and would otherwise be damaged.

The best feature of these bags, besides their anti static properties is their reusable functionality; the storage bags have a resealable zip closure and can be reused again and again to store and protect your chosen items, helping to reduce plastic waste in to the environment.

Available Sizes: 6.6 (h) x 5 (w) inches OR 10 (h) by 8 (w) inches

Available Colors: Black or Bronze Brown Search Terms: gun zip back rifle bag pistol set cleaner barrel firearm repair tool kit tools clean picks brush for Features: - MULTIPURPOSE ANTI STATIC BAGS: The anti static storage, travel and transfer bags by ASR Tactical are a multipurpose tool to keep with your bug out bag, survival kit, emergency supplies, technology or electronics office, lab and more; traditionally used for storing electronic components, these reusable bags can be used to protect any ferrous and non-ferrous items from corrosion; sold in 10pks - ELECTRONIC COMPONENT STORAGE: Ideal for the storage or movement of electronic components like a hard drive, memory card or development boards and more, the polyethylene bags have a resealable zip closure and can be reused again and again to help protect delicate computer components - LONG TERM GUN STORAGE: If you're planning to store any small guns like pistols or handguns, these anti static reusable bags are a fantastic option to keep your gun protected from the outside environment and in excellent working condition; the resealable bags will ensure any moisture, damage or corrosion is bypassed for years to come - EMERGENCY SURVIVAL TOOL: In the case of natural disaster, earthquake, emergency, survival or prepping, these anti static storage bags will come in handy for storing cell phones, keys, passports, important documents, photos or other metal-construction items that need to stay safe and dry - SPECIFICATIONS: Available Sizes: 6.6 (h) x 5 (w) inches OR 10 (h) by 8(w) inches; Colors: Black, Bronze Brown; Material: polyethylene plastic; Sold as 10pk === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
